title: Build AI Apps Without Coding
subtitle: Create powerful AI-powered apps using no-code tools — no programming required

modules.title: No-Code AI Foundations
lessons: What no-code AI tools can do today
Overview of the top platforms: Bubble, Glide, Softr, and Make
How AI APIs connect to no-code apps
Choosing the right tool for your project
Setting up your first no-code workspace
modules.mini_task: Sign up for Bubble or Glide and explore the dashboard

modules.title: Connecting AI to Your App
lessons: What is an API and why it matters
Getting your OpenAI or Claude API key safely
Making your first API call without code using Make or Zapier
Displaying AI responses inside your app
Handling errors and empty responses gracefully
modules.mini_task: Connect an AI API to a Zapier or Make workflow and test it

modules.title: Building Your First AI Feature
lessons: Designing a text input form in Bubble
Sending user input to an AI API
Rendering the AI response back to the user
Saving results to a database
Adding a loading spinner for better UX
modules.mini_task: Build a simple AI Q&A form that shows an answer when submitted

modules.title: Adding AI Features to Real Apps
lessons: AI writing assistant inside a notes app
AI product description generator for an e-commerce template
AI-powered FAQ chatbot with no code
Image caption generator using AI vision APIs
Storing and displaying AI history
modules.mini_task: Add an AI writing assistant button to a notes app template

modules.title: Launch and Iterate
lessons: Testing your app on mobile
Sharing your app with a public link
Collecting user feedback on AI quality
Iterating on AI prompts to improve results
Planning your next AI feature
modules.mini_task: Share your app link with one person and note their feedback

final_project: Build and publish a fully functional AI-powered no-code app that takes user input, sends it to an AI API, and displays a meaningful result.
